requirement.description: The transmission controller shall periodically indicate the clutch engagement state to the gateway ECU.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify signal is 0 when clutch is disengaged.
Verify signal is 1 when clutch is engaged.
preconditions: Clutch pedal fully pressed / actuator closed

test_cases.test_objective: Verify clutch state transition during an active gear shift.
test_cases.expected_result: Signal transitions to 1 during the physical gear change

test_cases.test_objective: Verify return to 0 (disengaged) after shift completion.
test_steps: Monitor CAN ID 0x230 and extract Bit 5
